.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reorder import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
Reformat the DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL string concatenation to a single line for readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "..." + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/...";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat the MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH string constant to a single line.
Reformat the MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH string constant to a single line.
Add space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.
Add space after 'if' keyword in null check to comply with standard code style.
Add space after 'if' keyword in directory existence check to comply with standard code style.
Add space after 'if' keyword in mkdirs check to comply with standard code style.
Reformat the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better indentation and readability.
Remove trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed blank line before closing brace

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Add CRLFLogConverter.CRLF_SAFE_MARKER to the log call to prevent log injection vulnerabilities or formatting issues.
Modify active profiles logging to show default profiles if no active profiles are explicitly set, improving startup visibility.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or formatting.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Update single-element annotation attribute to use explicit array syntax for consistency with modern Java style guides.
Remove the separate WebSecurity ignore configuration as static resources are now permitted via authorizeHttpRequests.
Update CSRF configuration to use ignoringRequestMatchers and explicit CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler.
Add SpaWebFilter and CookieCsrfFilter explicitly to the filter chain using addFilterAfter.
Update JwtDecoder bean to accept ClientRegistrationRepository and RestTemplateBuilder for custom claim conversion.
Set a CustomClaimConverter on the JwtDecoder to handle custom claims from the OIDC provider.
Remove dependency on SecurityProblemSupport for exception handling, likely moving to global exception handling or default behavior.
Source Content Security Policy directives from JHipsterProperties instead of hardcoding them.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the specific app subdirectory in favor of the root static directory.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed RESOURCE_LOCATIONS from including 'classpath:/static/app/' to just 'classpath:/static/'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced RESOURCE_PATHS array with explicit patterns like '/*.js', '/*.css', '/*.svg', '/*.png', '*.ico', '/content/**', and '/i18n/*'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify type checking and casting logic.
Remove try-catch block for UnsupportedEncodingException because StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always supported in modern Java.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3 endpoints, removing deprecated Swagger 2 paths.
